assertionResults.title: Intraday series render with shared time axis (8 PM – 8 AM)
assertionResults.observed: Night UI rendered glucose, heart-rate, and sleep panels with synchronized overnight ticks and aligned x-axis labels spanning the same night window.

assertionResults.title: Sleep hypnogram renders with stage differentiation
assertionResults.observed: Sleep panel shows staged hypnogram segments with distinct Awake/Light/Deep/REM differentiation and corresponding labels.

assertionResults.title: Summary strip with polarity-colored delta badges
assertionResults.observed: Summary strip includes Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, Sleep Latency, HRV, RHR, and REM with polarity deltas (worse in red/down, better in green/up) matching expected directionality.

assertionResults.title: S1 scenario — meal → glucose spike → HR → sleep disruption causal chain
assertionResults.observed: The S1 surface presents the end-to-end chain at a glance: meal marker, overnight glucose rise, elevated HR signal, sleep-stage disruption, and warning insights/deltas consistent with the scenario.

assertionResults.title: Fresh baselines render as normal range bands on frontend
assertionResults.observed: API returns populated baseline ranges, but frontend DOM/screenshot evidence shows no explicit low-opacity baseline reference band; only regular chart area fills (fillOpacity 0.6) were observed.

assertionResults.title: Night view window spans yesterday 8 PM to today 8 AM correctly
assertionResults.observed: Night API and UI both align to the overnight contract for 2026-03-28, with time_range start/end matching previous-day 8 PM through requested-day 8 AM and UI axis labels reflecting overnight boundaries.

assertionResults.title: Night view for in-progress night handles incomplete data
assertionResults.observed: At runtime (07:54 EDT), the current-night view showed active overnight data ending near now without misleading synthetic continuation, satisfying in-progress handling expectations.

frictions.description: Fresh session initially redirected to /sign-in before dashboard assertions could be executed.
frictions.resolution: Generated a local mock-auth token for user_test_001 and set it as the __session cookie.

frictions.description: Collapsed chart view did not expose clear baseline-band elements for frontend assertion.
frictions.resolution: Expanded the heart-rate chart and captured additional DOM/SVG artifacts to confirm baseline-band non-rendering versus available API baselines.

summary: Validated 7 assigned assertions for rerun4-night-ui-cross: 6 passed (VAL-UINGT-001/002/003/004, VAL-CROSS-019, VAL-CROSS-020) and 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-007 baseline-band rendering).
